summary: Frontend testing for TeacherHubPro PDF Export - Expanded layout to fill page vertically. ALL REQUIREMENTS VERIFIED AND PASSED.

issues: Minor: React hydration warnings about <th> and <td> elements being children of <span> - does not affect functionality or print output

critical_code_review_comments: PlanPrintView.js correctly implements expanded layout with flex:1 on table to fill remaining vertical space
Table fills 79.45% of page height (793.2px) with only 10px white space at bottom - significant improvement
Checkboxes correctly sized at 10px × 10px with 1px solid border
Font sizes expanded: labels 9px, theme cells 10px, content cells 8px
All 5 day columns (Lunes-Viernes) visible and properly sized at 17.8% width each
All 4 table rows visible: Day Theme, DOK Levels, Activities, Materials
Standards page has two-column layout with First Week and Second Week side by side
Integration with subjects section visible with all 8 subjects
Teacher's Signature / Date and Principal's Signature / Date lines present
No content overflow - both pages have overflow:hidden and scrollHeight equals clientHeight
seed_data_creation: Used existing plan 'Unit 3 - The Big Adventure' (plan_bc34a47a) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: TeacherHubPro PDF Export expanded layout feature is FULLY WORKING. Verified: 1) Table uses flex:1 to fill remaining vertical space, 2) Only 10px white space at bottom (79.45% fill), 3) No content overflow, 4) All 5 day columns visible, 5) All 4 table rows visible, 6) 10px checkboxes render correctly (133 total), 7) Standards page two-column layout, 8) Integration with subjects section, 9) Teacher/Principal signature lines.
verification_method: Playwright browser automation with JavaScript DOM evaluation to verify content structure, styles, dimensions, and overflow behavior
